label: New
items: Partial harvests — new "Picked some" action on the harvest task footer lets you log a yield (quantity + unit + notes) and snooze the task for 1, 3, 5 or 7 days without closing it. Perfect for berries, beans, courgettes, chillies and anything else you pick over weeks.
The task modal now shows a "Picked so far in this window" running total above the action buttons so you can see how much you've harvested this season.

label: Fixed
items: One-time cleanup: existing harvest tasks that piled up under the old daily-cadence model are now backfilled to the new window model, and the per-day duplicates inside each window are collapsed into one task. Your harvest backlog should look a lot calmer.
Harvest action footer reorganised into a 2×2 grid (Harvested · Picked some · Not yet · Check with AI) so the new action gets equal weight without crowding.
